name: Staked Yuzu USD
redeem: syzUSD can be unstaked back to yzUSD in a one-step process that Yuzu says completes almost instantly. Redeeming yzUSD through Yuzu's primary mint/redeem flow is limited to eligible investors who pass KYC/KYB/AML and related checks, so other holders may need to rely on secondary-market liquidity.
notes: ERC-4626 wrapper for staked yzUSD. Yuzu describes yzUSD as an overcollateralized senior tranche backed by curated onchain strategies, with yzPP as first-loss support and a reserve fund.
